title: The Enchanted Mirror
tagline: Your webcam reflection repaints itself in the brushstrokes of a random museum old master.
holy_shit: Every reload picks a different real painting to haunt your face, and every frame stays on your device.
powered_by: getUserMedia + on-device Canvas 2D brushstroke rendering with a random public-domain museum palette
weld: Transplants taste-the-weather's narrated live #go flow and provenance-camera's canvas-first rendering discipline, then welds them into a webcam-to-brushstroke pipeline colored by a random museum artwork palette on each reload.
agent_scenario: When you need: a no-backend live webcam visual that feels magical, discloses its source artwork, and keeps all frame processing local.
author: kody-w + Copilot
